2188840.name: Doom Cube
2188840.description:
Story

You are but a mere Seed Cube—the smallest form of a vast, planet-consuming entity. Launched from a fully developed Cube that has already devoured an entire world, you hurtle through space like a blazing meteor… until you crash land on Earth.

Your mission? Assimilate. Grow. Dominate. Absorb enough matter to reach full size and continue the cycle of cosmic conquest. Should resistance arise, you have an infinite arsenal of advanced technology at your disposal to eradicate any threats. Reach Cube "Adulthood," launch the next seed, and begin the cycle anew…

Style

  • Enjoy some light RPG and roguelike experience in this action-packed game that has something in store for players with any experience level!

  • Stunning 2D-pixel art combined with modern particle effects and dynamic lighting.

Gameplay Features

🔺 Unleash devastating "Death Rays!" Eliminate your enemies in bizarre and horrifying ways.

🔺 Evolve & Expand: Your Cube analyzes threats and auto-generates weapons, creating absurdly overpowered and unexpected armaments!

🔺 Total Destruction: Nothing is safe—reduce the world to rubble, absorb the remains, and convert them into terrifying new technologies.

🔺 Assimilate & Transform: Use harvested matter to craft reality-breaking devices, fuel nightmarish attacks, or summon unfathomable horrors from the Red Void.

"Don't be a square... Be the Cube!" - Wishlist now!
